---
title: "jacobian_det_displacement"
generated: true
description: "Per-point determinant of the deformation Jacobian."
---

[‚Äπ back to `nitrix.geometry.grid`](../nitrix-geometry-grid.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:jacobian_det_displacement -->
```python
jacobian_det_displacement(u: Float[Array, '... *spatial d'], *, boundary_mode: Literal['nearest', 'wrap', 'mirror'] = 'nearest', spacing: Union[float, Sequence[float]] = 1.0) -> Float[Array, '... *spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:jacobian_det_displacement -->
Per-point determinant of the deformation Jacobian.

Computes $det(I + \nabla u)$ at each spatial location.  For
`d <= 3` uses the explicit closed-form determinant (avoiding
LU factorisation noise and $O(d^3)$ cost); for `d > 3`
falls back to `jnp.linalg.det`.

Parameters and `boundary_mode` / `spacing` semantics match
`jacobian_displacement`.

Folding interpretation: `det(J) > 0` means the deformation
is locally orientation-preserving; `det(J) <= 0` indicates
the warp folds at this voxel (and is not a diffeomorphism
there).  The standard QA threshold is "no voxels with
`det <= 0`"; the soft regulariser is
$mean(max(0, Œµ - det)^2)$ for some `Œµ > 0`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:jacobian_det_displacement -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `u` | `Float` | `...` √ó `*spatial` √ó `d` | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| `boundary_mode` | `Literal['nearest', 'wrap', 'mirror']` | ‚Äî | `'nearest'` | ‚Äî |
| `spacing` | `Union[float, Sequence[float]]` | ‚Äî | `1.0` | ‚Äî |

**Returns** `Float` ‚Äî shape `...` √ó `*spatial`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen perf:jacobian_det_displacement -->
:::: {.callout-note title="Benchmarks ‚Äî nitrix-perf-bench" collapse="true"}
GPU steady-state **118.8 ¬µs** (median, L4); up to **44.66√ó faster** than `numpy.jacobian_det`.  [full report](https://github.com/hypercoil/nitrix-perf-bench/blob/main/reports/PERF_JACOBIAN_DET_DISPLACEMENT.md)

::: {.table-responsive}
| case | platform | param | baseline | status | steady (min/med) | compile | mem | fidelity | ratio |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cpu | d=32 | `cupy.jacobian_det_displacement` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cpu | d=32 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 178.4 ¬µs / 181.8 ¬µs | 168.81 ms | 782 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00025√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cpu | d=32 | `numpy.jacobian_det` | ok | 890.0 ¬µs / 910.5 ¬µs | 2.43 ms | 782 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00033√ótol | 4.99x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=32 | `cupy.jacobian_det_displacement` | ok | 842.5 ¬µs / 918.2 ¬µs | 164.36 ms | 0.39 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00033√ótol | 8.06x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=32 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 104.5 ¬µs / 118.8 ¬µs | 622.01 ms | 38.80 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00033√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=32 | `numpy.jacobian_det` | ok | 812.5 ¬µs / 823.2 ¬µs | 2.23 ms | 0.39 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00033√ótol | 7.77x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cpu | d=48 | `cupy.jacobian_det_displacement` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cpu | d=48 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 369.1 ¬µs / 382.9 ¬µs | 196.76 ms | 782 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00025√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cpu | d=48 | `numpy.jacobian_det` | ok | 2.48 ms / 2.56 ms | 3.88 ms | 782 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.0003√ótol | 6.72x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=48 | `cupy.jacobian_det_displacement` | ok | 826.8 ¬µs / 831.5 ¬µs | 142.08 ms | 2.10 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0003√ótol | 7.07x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=48 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 117.0 ¬µs / 127.3 ¬µs | 714.57 ms | 51.58 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0003√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=48 | `numpy.jacobian_det` | ok | 2.42 ms / 3.11 ms | 4.20 ms | 2.10 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.0003√ótol | 20.71x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cpu | d=64 | `cupy.jacobian_det_displacement` | skipped | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî | ‚Äî |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cpu | d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 854.6 ¬µs / 864.9 ¬µs | 190.74 ms | 782 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00027√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cpu | d=64 | `numpy.jacobian_det` | ok | 7.30 ms / 7.79 ms | 9.53 ms | 782 MB (rss) | ‚úì 0.00033√ótol | 8.54x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `cupy.jacobian_det_displacement` | ok | 828.3 ¬µs / 844.8 ¬µs | 366.65 ms | 4.19 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00033√ótol | 5.43x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `nitrix-jax` | ok | 152.5 ¬µs / 154.8 ¬µs | 640.50 ms | 77.59 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00033√ótol | 1.00x vs nitrix-jax |
| jacobian_det_displacement | jax-cuda12 | d=64 | `numpy.jacobian_det` | ok | 6.81 ms / 6.93 ms | 9.22 ms | 4.19 MB (hbm) | ‚úì 0.00033√ótol | 44.66x vs nitrix-jax |
:::

*source: bench `361141e2` ¬∑ nitrix `5d1717e0`*
::::
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:jacobian_det_displacement -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `...` | anonymous leading (batch) axes |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
